title: Irregular plural nouns review
description: Learn the plurals of some everyday irregular nouns!
topic_path: Irregular plural nouns: mutant and foreign plurals

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the standard plural form of the underlined noun.**

>Alex watched the waddling __goose__ with great interest.


[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**"Goose"** has a mutant plural form.

Unfortunately, mutant plurals have no single rule we can follow. We need to learn mutant plurals through our experience with words.

assessment_items.question_content:
**Choose the standard plural form of the underlined noun.**


>Zia and Wajd began a social club for __woman__ in their town.



[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**"Woman"** has a mutant plural form.

Unfortunately, mutant plurals have no single rule we can follow. We need to learn mutant plurals through our experience with words.

Unfortunately, mutant plurals have no single rule we can follow. We need to learn mutant plurals through our experience with words.

assessment_items.question_content:

>The __thief__ made off with an entire trunk of precious gems.

**"Bacterium"** has a foreign plural form.

Unfortunately, foreign plurals have no single rule we can follow. We need to learn mutant plurals through our experience with words.

assessment_items.question_content:

[[☃ radio 1]]

In the autumn, oak trees shed their __leaf__.
